text:
# Welcome to Your GEO Audit! 👋

You're on the **overview** tab of your FlowBlinq GEO audit for **flowblinq.com** (a Next.js site).

## Your Current Score
**69/100** — solid foundation! You're in the **paid tier**, which means you have access to advanced features like per-page analysis, daily crawls, and competitor intelligence.

## What's on This Overview Tab

The overview shows:
- **Overall GEO Score** — how visible your site is to AI agents (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini)
- **Key metrics** — audit summary, critical issues, and opportunities
- **Citation tracking** — whether AI agents cite your site (you can run a citation check to see real mentions)
- **Competitive intelligence** — how your site stacks up against competitors
- **Audit history** — when you last ran the scan

## How I Can Help

I can walk you through:
- 📊 **Understanding your audit results** — what your score means and why certain pillars matter
- ✅ **Fixing recommendations** — actionable steps to improve AI visibility (from the Recommendations tab)
- 🚀 **Deploying fixes** — how to add llms.txt, schema, or other assets to your Next.js site (via the Setup tab)
- 💡 **Exploring other tabs** — scorecard details, per-page breakdowns, audit history

**What would you like to dig into first?** Your score, specific recommendations, or how to deploy fixes?
